projects.name: Joben
projects.description: Designed and developed an AI Resume Builder from scratch using prompt engineering techniques Built the full feature independently using AI-assisted development workflows Engineered prompts to automatically generate tailored resumes based on job listing context
bullets: Designed and developed an AI Resume Builder from scratch using prompt engineering techniques

projects.name: DiveIn
projects.description: Founded and coordinated a team of 7 to build the largest youth opportunity hub in Buzău Reached 200+ young people through curated development opportunities and community outreach Centralized 100+ local and national opportunities in a single accessible hub Secured 2 press appearances, increasing visibility and credibility of the initiative Supported by Leaders Foundation: access to national mentors and organizational backing
bullets: Founded and coordinated a team of 7 to build the largest youth opportunity hub in Buzău
Reached 200+ young people through curated development opportunities and community outreach.
Centralized 100+ local and national opportunities in a single accessible hub.
Secured 2 press appearances, increasing visibility and credibility of the initiative.
Supported by Leaders Foundation: access to national mentors and organizational backing.

summary: Developer and founder with 3 active projects shipped, a team led, and infrastructure costs cut by 40%. Built AI-powered products, coordinated cross-functional teams, and consistently delivered measurable results across technical and strategic roles.

work_experience.description: Coordinated a team of 4 students to develop the presentation website and educational platform using React and Vercel.
bullets: Coordinated a team of 4 students to develop the presentation website and educational platform using React and Vercel
Reduced operational costs by 40% by migrating infrastructure from AWS to a self-hosted Docker container with ScyllaDB, eliminating all monthly cloud costs.
Implemented Auth0 authentication system for the educational platform.

work_experience.description: Contributed to the development of the educational platform using React.js.
bullets: Contributed to the development of the educational platform using React.js
Supported students in building and maintaining the WordPress presentation website.
Promoted to Tech Director based on technical contributions and leadership.
